_comment: auto-repair stage=0-bootstrap attempt=1 with prior task JSON — support mode reads discovery/task-<slug>.json when present and embeds title + description excerpt in the payload. Guards the read path: a KeyError-shaped fall-through in stage 0 would leak an empty payload and the loop would silently 'succeed' with no context.

files.discovery/task-clickup_support-meta.json: {"name":"Login redirect loops on Safari 17","text_content":"Users on Safari 17.2 report the OAuth flow bouncing between the app and the IdP. Started after the June deploy."}
